items.name_cn:
Make sure to recognize the thick fabric ⚠️
Small [Book Tote]
Most people think of buying practical classic styles when consuming luxury brands 💄But a collaboration art TOTE like DIO R should be a key collection piece, full of vintage vibes 😋Carry it and you are a fashion icon ⚪It really holds a lot 😍Super spacious, feels like it can hold the whole world!
Size: 26.5cm

items.name_en: Small Tote from the latest Qixi Limited Edition series. Sweet Qixi, a unique romantic style, is so attractive to girls. The red body is embellished with small red flowers, super gentle and sweet, helping you capture moments of love. Exquisite embroidery paired with black cowhide, sweet yet elegant. The bag comes with an adjustable long shoulder strap, preserving the simple shape while offering the large capacity of a big bag. It can be carried by hand or worn diagonally, fully meeting daily travel needs.

items.name_cn:
#D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag 'Monogram with Leather'
This D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, offering a modern silhouette that enriches the D-Vibe line. Crafted with care from materials like blue Oblique print fabric, it highlights the Oblique print and is accented with smooth calfskin details. A practical style with a slip pocket for easy storage of daily essentials, featuring a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Zip closure
1 compartment
Internal slip pocket
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 2388
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
#Medium Signature Tote Bag 'Pink'
This Signature Tote Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from pink calfskin with tonal grained calfskin details, it features a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. A spacious compartment with a snap button and leather strap closure safely holds daily essentials, with a slip pocket for added refinement. The medium style comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for easy hand, shoulder, or crossbody carrying.
Calfskin metal snap button and leather strap closure
Top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal slip pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 24x21x14cm (LxHxW)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
#Small Signature Bucket Bag in Pink
This Signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from pink calfskin, it features tonal pebbled leather details and a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious compartment features a snap closure and leather strap opening, offering a secure place for daily essentials, with an interior pocket for added refinement. The small size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing for easy carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Metal snap closure and leather strap opening; top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap; interior pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 21×19×11cm (L×H×W)
Fits 1 smartphone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_en: Toujours Vertical Medium, the exclusive 'market bag', is simply beautiful. A high-appeal bag that effortlessly exudes sophistication. Featuring an oversized quilted design paired with classic lettering accessories, it offers a modern and stylish look. The bag structure is very soft, and the calfskin material feels premium. The unique buckle fastening allows the sides to fold when closed. It comes with a long shoulder strap, scoring full marks for practicality and capacity, easily holding all daily essentials.

items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-Grade Imported Factory Embroidery (D-Journey) Monogram Fabric. This D-Journey Handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the Dior 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear show. It features a soft texture and a modern reinterpretation of the dumpling bag silhouette. Crafted from blue denim calfskin, it is accented with flat oversized diagonal quilting, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern. The main compartment features a zip pocket, and two side pockets with large leather zip pulls, each adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo, making it easy to store various small daily items. The small size comes with an adjustable top handle and leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand carrying, shoulder carrying, or crossbody wear, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.

items.name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-tier Imported Original Cowhide Suede (D-Journey) Black
This D-Journey handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the Dior 2025 Spring/Summer Couture Show. It features a soft texture and a modern reinterpretation of the dumpling bag silhouette. Crafted from suede cowhide, it is embellished with flat oversized woven trim stitching, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern. The main compartment includes a zip pocket, and two side pockets with large leather zip pulls, adorned with a vintage gold-finished metal Christian Dior Paris logo, making it convenient for storing various daily small items. The small size comes with an adjustable top handle and leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder carry, or crossbody wear, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Model No. 2416
Dimensions: 23 x 14 x 16 cm (L x H x W)

This D-Journey handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the Dior 2025 Spring/Summer Couture Show. It features a soft texture and a modern reinterpretation of the dumpling bag silhouette. Crafted from suede cowhide, it is embellished with flat oversized woven trim stitching, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern. The main compartment includes a zip pocket, and two side pockets with large leather zip pulls, adorned with a vintage gold-finished metal Christian Dior Paris logo, making it convenient for storing various daily small items. The small size comes with an adjustable top handle and leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder carry, or crossbody wear, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Model No. 2416
Dimensions: 23 x 14 x 16 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 23 x 14 x 12 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Small Black Dior Toujours Shopping Bag. Fashion-forward individuals have already been spotted carrying this; it is cooler than imagined, giving off a chic yet lazy vibe. The familiar oversized woven pattern and the CD buckle used in recent years transform the square bag into a tote bag when unclasped—truly amazing 👍👍👍.
It looks very spacious at first glance, suitable for gym or daily commuting. It comes with an internal small leather pouch that can be removed and used separately! The key detail is the adjustable wrist strap length, allowing for underarm or hand-carry; this detail is truly captivating. A bag that will make you stand out in any crowd, unrestricted by style. A heavyweight bestseller this season—why wait?

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Dior CEST Monogram Bucket Bag. Elegant and classic, with blue oblique monogram fabric, the unique bucket shape looks like a money bag!
Features a rotating D-letter opening CD lock; tightening the opening ensures high security, while loosening it gives a casual, lazy feel. Both the short and long shoulder straps are adjustable and detachable. The rigid base gives it a more three-dimensional look, maximizing the atmosphere!
Mainly achieving bag freedom, sisters, go for it!

items.name_cn:

Hong Kong Channel Order! Dior CEST Full Leather Bucket Bag. The design is really special, a mix of cool and sweet! At first glance, you will be captivated by its print: the overlapping CD letter print is very eye-catching. Made of calfskin, it has a soft, delicate touch and a moist luster, maintaining an elegant and atmospheric texture!
The "dior" lettering on the pocket is finely engraved, looking very high-end and classy. Looking at the size, it is large enough with internal layering to ensure storage of personal items without looking too bulky. The detail design is simple and orderly, perfect for friends with OCD!

items.name_cn:
Dior Top-tier Imported Original Cowhide Shoulder Bag Small [White]
This CD Besace handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the 2024 Spring/Summer Couture Show. It features a stylish silhouette with a subtle vintage charm, making it unique. Crafted from white cowhide, the flap is adorned with a striking gold-finished metal CD logo. The interior is spacious and practical. The small size comes with an adjustable cowhide shoulder strap, allowing for shoulder or crossbody wear, and can be paired with various casual or elegant styles this season.
Front adorned with CD logo
Flap opening
Interior compartment features a zip pocket and slip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap [6]
Dimensions: 24 x 15 x 6 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 wallet, 1 card holder, 1 mobile phone, and sunglasses
